global_description: A medium-sized duck with a streamlined body and a slightly rounded head. The plumage is predominantly mottled gray and brown, with a distinctive black patch on the tail. The wings have a white speculum bordered by black and chestnut. The bill is dark and slightly flattened.

part_details.head: Slightly rounded, covered in fine mottled gray and brown feathers.
part_details.body: Streamlined, predominantly gray and brown with a black tail patch.
part_details.wings: Broad with a white speculum bordered by black and chestnut.
part_details.bill: Dark, slightly flattened, and broad at the base.

spatial_relations: The black patch is located at the tail end of the body.
The white speculum is bordered by black and chestnut on the wings.
The bill extends forward from the head.
